case_title: HACKETT, GERALD P. VS THE COLUMBIA HOTEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HACKETT, GERALD P.
